pages.text:
**LIMITED POWER OF ATTORNEY DEED**
**Document ID: poa_011**
**Date of Deed: 17 March 2023**
**Place of Execution: Bruges, Belgium**
**Notary: Meester Katrien Lemaire, Bruges**

---

**BETWEEN:**

**Maria Janssen-De Vos**, born on 22 July 1951, residing at [full address], Bruges, Belgium, hereinafter
referred to as the "Principal" or "Grantor".

**AND:**

**Thomas Janssen**, born on 9 November 1972, son of the Principal, residing at [full address], Bruges,
Belgium, hereinafter referred to as the "Attorney-in-Fact" or "Mandatary".

---

**BACKGROUND:**

WHEREAS the Principal wishes to appoint a limited power of attorney for specific financial management
purposes;

WHEREAS the Principal has previously granted a broader power of attorney to a third party, Hendrik,
which she now seeks to limit for reasons of caution and specificity;

WHEREAS the Principal has full trust in the capabilities of the Attorney-in-Fact to manage her financial
affairs in a manner that is prudent and responsible;

NOW, THEREFORE, the Principal grants the following limited power of attorney to the Attorney-in-Fact
under the terms and conditions set forth herein.

---

**1. SCOPE OF POWERS:**

The Principal hereby grants the Attorney-in-Fact the following powers:

1.1 **Financial Administration:** To manage the Principal's financial affairs, including but not limited to
budgeting, account management, and general financial oversight.

1.2 **Bill Payment:** To make payments on behalf of the Principal for her regular bills and obligations,
including utilities, insurance premiums, and other necessary expenses.

1.3 **Banking Formalities:** To conduct banking transactions on behalf of the Principal, including
deposits, withdrawals, and transfers, as well as to communicate with banking institutions regarding the
Principal's accounts.

1.4 **Pension and Insurance Administration:** To manage and administer the Principal’s pension
schemes and insurance policies, including making necessary inquiries and handling claims.

---

**2. EXCLUSIONS:**

The powers granted to the Attorney-in-Fact are strictly limited and shall not include:

2.1 **Healthcare Decisions:** The Attorney-in-Fact is expressly excluded from making any healthcare or
medical decisions on behalf of the Principal.

2.2 **Disposal of Real Estate:** The Attorney-in-Fact shall not have the authority to sell, transfer, or
otherwise dispose of any real estate owned by the Principal unless a separate express authority is
granted in writing.

---

**3. DURATION AND REVOCATION:**

3.1 **Duration:** This Limited Power of Attorney shall remain in effect until revoked by the Principal in
writing or until the Principal’s death.

3.2 **Revocation:** The Principal reserves the right to revoke this Limited Power of Attorney at any time,
provided that such revocation is communicated in writing to the Attorney-in-Fact.

3.3 **Accountability:** The Attorney-in-Fact shall keep accurate records of all transactions and actions
taken under this Limited Power of Attorney and shall provide an accounting to the Principal upon request.

---

**4. ACCEPTANCE:**

By signing below, the Attorney-in-Fact hereby accepts the appointment under the terms and conditions of
this Limited Power of Attorney.

---

**SIGNATURES:**

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Limited Power of Attorney deed on the day and
year first above written.

**Maria Janssen-De Vos**
_________________________
(Signature of Principal)

**Thomas Janssen**
_________________________
(Signature of Attorney-in-Fact)

**NOTARY ATTESTATION:**

I, Meester Katrien Lemaire, Notary Public in Bruges, Belgium, do hereby certify that the parties appeared
before me on this day and that they executed this Limited Power of Attorney deed in my presence. I have
confirmed their identities and the voluntary nature of this act.

**Notary Signature:**
_________________________
**Meester Katrien Lemaire**
Notary Public
Bruges, Belgium

---

**END OF DOCUMENT**

Notary Public
Bruges, Belgium
